creator: daniel@octaforge.org
text:
Well, the commit is identical to my patch, so there's nothing to confirm... I'm running a kernel with that applied right now.

As for the speeds, I'm seeing around 35-40MB/s write (that is with NTFS-3G). When reading a file, it's around 230MB/s on average. That kind of speed would obviously not be reachable over USB 2.0. This is on a 5400RPM 2.5" drive (as you can see from the usbconfig output, Samsung M3 Portable).
